subcodes.first_line: This is a mighty Book that cometh from God, the Almighty, the All-Wise. Despair not of the mercy of God, for His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب عظیم انه من الله العزیز الحکیم الا تفنطوا من رحمه الله و ان رحمته
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
